name: Hashdex Nasdaq CME Crypto Index ETF
business: The Trust is an exchange-traded fund designed to provide investors with price exposure to certain crypto assets by tracking the Nasdaq CME Crypto Settlement Price Index.
sellsTo: investors seeking price exposure to crypto assets

exposures.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, the Index Constituents were bitcoin (BTC), ether (ETH), XRP, solana (SOL), cardano (ADA), chainlink (LINK) and stellar (XLM).
